title: good bass, good microphone
text: Well, so far, so good. Bass is waaay better than another set of sport earbuds I had; it's not thumping, but ir's decent; good enough for me. Also, microphone for phone calls seems to be good, people I've called said they hear me loud and clear, no buzzing or static. I like the case, too, with it's digital display.

title: Great sound
text: I just got this product yesterday. The shipping was great timing. I charged them but they keep saying 78% charged even though I left them 2 hours. I will leave them over night to charge se of that changes. But I did try them. Connected easy to portable MP3 player and sounds great. I said I would buy again but no I wouldn’t. Sound is great and connect easy to device but don’t charge completely. Charged overnight and only said 68%. They are comfortable and stay secure.

title: Great value and quality
text: This is my third pair of Occiams. I love them. They are the most comfortable ones I’ve had. The over the ear piece keeps them in place without having to shove the earbuds into your ears. You cannot beat the quality at a reasonable price. I highly recommend them.

title: Scoop...but great service!
text:
So standing by everything was written before, I have to say it's fantastic to have a company to do right by their customers. I had a problem with my buds, and the company replaced them right away. I was very happy with the resolution, and will definitely be a repeat customer.

----

Nice noise canceling, solid as a rock Bluetooth, and a really nice carry case. I also like they way that they feel on my ears, very solid and doesn't move or slip out. Sound quality leaves something to be desired, although you should keep in mind that is a very personal choice. For those of you who are in the know, the way I'd describe these is "scooped". In other words, in a standard EQ range, the mid ranges are de-emphasized for in favor of the low (or sometimes high) ranges so the the EQU range looks like it's been scooped out. I don't generally have a problem with this for certain kinds of music, but it can get a little annoying at times. Podcasts/spoken word doesn't need boo

title: Great product, but it
text: Good ear buds. Great sound quality. Also, easy connection to my phone.

title: Completely dead after less than 6mos of use.
text: These earbuds were decent at first, nothing fancy, but my husband just wanted some to wear while he was hiking. They stayed in his ears fine. However, after 5mos of casual use and taking perfect care of them, they now refuse to connect in any way to any device. There is no sound at all coming out of the earbuds and no way to connect them via Bluetooth. They are 100% charged, and the just completely stopped working. It's obviously past the point that I can exchange or get a refund, and I honestly would not recommend buying this product. I've gotten less expensive wireless earbuds that have lasted me 5 years with no issues. Keep searching for something better.

title: Gym music
text: It's just like the pictures online and fit really well. sound quality is great for the gym or any place with some background noise.

title: Works Great
text: These work great.  They are very comfortable, the sound quality is good, and the charging case is nice.  I have many other BT headphones but they are attached by a wire to each other.  These are great without that wire especially when working out - gives you complete freedom and no more wire sticking to your neck.  I would highly recommend buying these.

title: Sounds good!
text: Sound is fine, connection is easy, I really like that both headphone have a mic so I can talk on the phone with either one in. The one thing that I have noticed is that it won't always pick up signal from my phone if my phone is in my back pocket, it's not the end of the world but it is slightly annoying especially when I'm out gardening or something. It's the only reason they lost a star from me.

title: It's hard to improve an already good product but they did
text:
I received them today and checked the charge.  Thank you for sending them 90% charged and ready for great listening. After replacing the ear caps with the smallest size, I paired the earbuds to my phone to check out the sound quality and ease of adjusting volume.  

The quality is so good I had listened to six songs before I realized that my testing was almost but not quite done. Given the conditions of the day, I grabbed a facemask and put it on, then took it off, repeating the process two more times.  The new, tighter fitting, ear hooks do not catch the mask ear strings.  Thank you for doing a great job, definite 5 out of 5 on these, better sound, better fit, easier to use controls, all at a great price.

title: Fit well, perform well, my 'go to' ear buds!
text: I've grown accustomed to listening to my Amazon playlist using these ear pods! They are comfortable (most of the time I forget I have them on!). They fit very well and keep out most outside noise while I'm using them. Sound quality isn't great (miss out on the very high and very low ranges a bit) but it's very good for everyday use. I mostly use them as replacements for my lost earpiece that connected to my iPhone for phone calls! I can easily listen to music and still take a call when it comes in! Perhaps the thing I like best about these ear pods is that storing them is a breeze in the charging case! The case not only gives me a place to keep them but it charges them while they're in there! And the LED window allows me to see just how much power remains on the case to charge them with! Keeping my ear pods charged couldn't be easier!

title: Great ear buds for the money! You must check these out.
text: Some of the info in the descriptions is a bit misleading, otherwise a full 5 stars are due.  The 48 hr run time stated in the description is the total run time using the fantastic charging case to charge the buds 6 times with an average actual playtime of 8 hours.  That being said I have purchased over time several ear buds in the 30$ range and so far this set is the finest I've used.  Very small and comfortable, interface buttons that are easy to use, great sound, and the visual charging indicators are great. The stated distance of 30' is pretty darn accurate as well.  For the money, I can highly recommend you try these.  I don't think you will be disappointed.

title: A seriously great deal
text: Seriously, for the price how can you go wrong?  I had some of the well known fruit themed ones and they died within 2 weeks! If these last 6 months I could buy a new pair every six months for years!  They turn on automatically like the other well known brands. They’re really a good deal. I can’t stress that enough.

title: Great Fitness Companion for the Price
text:
Great for the price! I bought these to use when jogging and biking because they are more secure than the standard earbuds.

However, the case is made of hard plastic that feels slightly cheap, but not a deal breaker. The blue tooth is easy to pair and ready to use. There are volume controls on each bud to accommodate a left or right handed person which at times can be hit or miss. I prefer using the phone's volume control. *Update 4.30.2021. Neither volume control works any longer. You must use the volume control on your phone which can be a hassle when you’re riding a bike, etc. so I am changing 4 stars to 3

When it comes to sound performance, I would say for the average person, these are ideal. Nice bass! For the sound aficionado, on a scale from 1 to 10, It would be a strong 7 (weak 8) for the lack of true High Definition music resolution.

As for call quality, I'd give this a 6+ per several people I spoke to said they could hear an echo when speakin

title: Not what I hoped
text: These will not stay connected to my device(s) like previous buds I have that connect automatically every time. These lose their connection and have to be re-paired every time.

title: junk
text: need to return. right side headphone is dead and wont charge at all.

title: DOA (the left bud is not functional)
text: Mine were dead on arrival. The left one won't power on, pair with the right one or pair with the phone. DOA. I fully charged before I tried anything. The case says both buds are at 100% but the left doesn't function

title: they hurt...... do I have them in right?
text:
So I lost one of my other ear buds and had to buy a new paper. My older ones did not have the ear wrap and would fall out. I saw these on sale and since I had to replace my blue tooth eart buds when my $$ was tight, I wanted a good deal, so I went with these.
Overall, the sound seems to be fine. HOWEVER, I have been wearing them all weekend and my ear canal HURTS. I have tried various placement in my ear canal and haven't found a good placement. So I am wondering, do I have these actually IN right?? Possibly not.
It would be useful if there was a clear demonstration on the proper placement of these devices. I almost returned them but decided to research more .. cause I don't want to go through the hassle of returning them.

The 2nd issue I have that I didn't notice is that the included buttons are iffy. They turn on and off OK but you have to press down on the button more than on my other ones that is just via touch. WHICH probably is a good thing as I would

title: DO NOT RECOMMEND, DIED ON ME IN A MONTH!
text:
Head phones were decent for the price. The right ear bud dies significantly faster than the left side, regardless of if they're charged at the same time. Also I bought these January 16th and February 27th the right side shorted out. Haven't been able to get any support yet.

If customer support gets in contact with me I'll update this review. However, I cannot recommend these. They lasted a month.

title: Nearly impossible to charge
text: They sound fine for workout headphones. But it's almost impossible to charge them. When I put them in the case, usually only the left one charges. I have to press down and wiggle around the right one to get it to start charging, then when i let go, 90% of the time it looses connection to the contacts in the case, which makes it start searching for a Bluetooth signal. If my phone is nearby and playing audio, it will just switch to the right earbud that's still in the case. So I end up with a fully charged left bud, and a dead right one. So frustrating.

title: great buds just one little problem
text: bought these  6 months ago and think they are great except one thing that is really driving me nuts. I listen to audio books while walking or biking and no matter what my volume is set at when I get a call on phone it goes full blast it just blares INCOMING CALL and I can't turn it down once I answer  the volume is normal.

title: Awesome buy!
text: The sound is so clear, great fit and feeling, must buy! Best out on the market in my opinion.

title: Great at first...dead in a few weeks
text:
I loved these headphones originally. They had worked as intended and were seemingly high quality.

Now, the left side won't charge...and despite it seeming to still have some power, it won't pair with the right headphone.

title: Breaking down after a few months
text: These are good, but they sure don't last. My right one won't charge, and when I sit there and hold it in place for it to charge it says it's fully charged but it dies in 10 minutes.  and they disconnect randomly or shut off. For the price I guess this is to be expected? I mean, a few months worth of playtime? Even for cheap Chinese products I expected to get a year out of it.

title: Love these
text: I use these mainly for going to the gym and running and they’re amazing.

title: Broke-sent a new pair!
text:
Update #2: zero issues w the second pair! And the battery life on these is insane!!! I use them on walks w my dog just about every single day for an hour or more and I only have to charge them maybe once a month!!! Glad their customer service was so great and sent me another pair bc they really are nice

Update: The co sent a new pair out right away! Not broke and so far so good. Things happen, but when a co makes it right, that’s what counts!

The charging pad broke after maybe only 20 uses or so! Now the right ear bud won’t charge at al, rendering them useless.
Before that, the fit was pretty decent. Able to stay put for a run, not all that comfortable though. Lots of readjusting. Biggest complaint besides the charging pad breaking, was that the Bluetooth would randomly come on when they were in my purse or a different room, no movement or change, they just randomly decided to connect 🤷‍♀️

title: Long lasting battery
text:
Immediately upon delivery, I fully charged the earbuds. Later in the evening, I gave them a try. Surprised that they actually fit pretty well in my small ear canal opening and the pink color blended in with my lighter hair rather than shocked the viewer I’m pleased. So, the quality is there for a greatly reduced price! 1) Looonng battery time. (I was done with them before they were done with me). 2) sufficient volume range (louder really gets louder). 3). Easy to set up. (Yeah, I didn’t read instructions). 4) color choice. ICK!
Overall. EXCELLENT price as of today. Outstanding less than $30. Battery new. Shockingly strong, long lasting.

title: Comfortable to wear
text: Just received the headphones today.  Followed the directions and charged them first.  Could not find a Bluetooth setting on my SONY Smart TV.  Have to use a Bluetooth transmitter off the headphone Port which causes a lag in the sound. Works perfect using my computer, tablet and phone.

title: Love These Earphones!
text: Just received my earphones.  I always like when I get a rechargeable product that is already charged -- these arrived at 95% charged.  They fit comfortably -- and the sound is crystal clear. The first 2 songs I listened to were "Bring Me to Life" by Evanesence and "Nessun Dorma" by Sarah Brightman . Two incredible singers -- and the sound clarity and brightness is unsurpassed. I also like the ease of the multifunction button -- all controls at a single push. I HIGHLY recommend these earphones. I should mention that I had a pair of an earlier model by Occiam -- my youngest son thought they were "great" and took them. That says a great deal about the quality of their products.

title: Battery Charging poorly
text: Sound is good, but charging seems to be an issue.

title: They function, they stay in my ear. Not the best sound quality.
text: Not as good as my AirPods were. You could probably find some earbuds at a price point in between the two that are better than AirPods. But these earbuds aren’t that. Good for the price.

title: Will eventually stop charging.
text: Rust eventually formed on the little metal connection points in the case where the earbuds must make contact for charging. So now the earbuds won't charge at all. I loved the design of the earbuds themselves, but it doesn't matter since  they won't work anymore due to no battery.

title: Decent for the price
text: I like these headphones as they don't fall out when I'm active like my other headphones.  Unfortunately,  they aren't as loud either so when its loud around me, like on a treadmill,  these are loud, but not enough to down out ambient noises around me and when my rocking song comes on,  just not enough to fit my tastes.  But...., they stay in my ear and overall sound pretty good for the price.  Still searching for that perfect set of ear buds.

title: Great so far...
text: Speedy delivery, great sound and a great warranty... Let's see how it lasts will update if anything changes.

title: Worth the money spent !!
text: I just recieved the item, and have proceeded touge them the sound quality is excellent.

title: Doesn't charge one of the buds
text: Overall great sound and battery just charging issues. This is my Second pair in a few months and same issue.  one bud doesn't connect to the charging dock. It's a constant issue so be ware!!

title: Very comfortable in my ears!
text: Very comfortable and easy to pair with devices.

title: Great earbuds
text: Great sound, sturdy, wonderful price, fast shipping.

title: For this Price? Wonderful!
text: These are more comfortable than my airpods. It's easy to forget you have them on after you're done listening to whatever you're paired with. Bluetooth pairing is easy as pie, unless it's paired to another device, which unfortunately  means, unpairing that device first. I love the case and its charging display. Has many features that Apple's overpriced artsy pods have.

title: Worked great for six months then just died
text: Died after six months completely useless now I wish someone would give me a refund or offer me a better product. This is embarrassing for this company.

title: Silent Right (update)
text:
My right earbud just stopped working. I purchased these less than a month ago and all-of-a-sudden the right ear stopped working. Aside from that the sound quality is excellent. Softest setting is still quite loud.

(Update) replacement pair got the same problem. Right ear is going out and I'm 2 days passed the return window.

title: Great sound quality
text: Easy to use and great sound quality

title: Great Quality and Sound
text: They are very good quality earbuds. I bought them for my wife as a Christmas gift. She really enjoys the sound quality. For the price, these earbuds are very good!

title: They are very comfortable to the ear. Worth the purchase
text:
Excellent Quality for the price!
I'm really impressed with the sound quality of these buds. The bass is amazing without being too invasive and blurring the audio in your ear so that's a huge plus for me. Luv them!!!!

title: Mixed feelings
text: I ordered a pair for myself and my husband loved them so I  got him a pair. Not at all impressed with the attempt to get more info when I  tried to register the warranty.

title: Like to listen but not to talk to much!
text: I love that is good to listen to music very good. The only thing is that when I talk on the phone, people can hear me very well I have to talk loud in order for them to hear me. The battery life is good it reasonable. I love the charging box because you can charge the bluetooth up to 3 times with out charging the box. That's a plus!  It all depends how you use it! I love that you don't need the 2 buds to use it.

title: **EROkay sound quality, but died after 3 months.
text:
**EDIT** Company contacted me and offered money to take down my honest review. I did not take their money and will leave my honest review up. Make better products and you will have less negative reviews.

Purchased in Dec. 2020 because of high rating. Sound quality was okay and batter life was shorter than expected. One of the ear buds would occasionally disconnect, but a quick off/on would fix the issue. As of April 2021, the housing will no longer charge the ear buds, so they are useless. Since I pouchased in Dec. 2020 I am beyond the return window and I'm stuck with them. Will not buy again, but will look for a more quality earbud.

title: Needed the ear hook
text: I’ve not been incredibly active to use these airbuds for sports, but I guess I have a small interior ear structure. I can’t keep earbuds inside my ear without the help of the “ear hooks.” These do the trick. Comfortable, sound is good and I got a pretty color of navy. Also they came with different sized plugs, and included was the charger cord.

title: Tremendous battery life
text: Excellent sound quality, noise cancellation and battery life...

title: Blah.
text: EXTREMELY difficult to pair in fact it rarely works, and I followed the directions did not work to fix it.

title: Nice fit
text: Great for working out as the don’t fall out of ear.

title: Good sound quality and good battery life
text: Good Sound Quality and good battery life. connection is fast and reliable.

title: Horrific battery life
text: Battery life if extremely short. I lost my last set that I had for over a year that I paid $15 for.  They lasted 8+ hours. This headset hear can not make 3 hours on a full charge.  Completely disappointed and now they are going right back.  Back to the drawing board!

title: Must get it now
text: Built strong, comfortable and quality sound.

title: Ear buds will not charge
text: In the beginning I loved the way they sounded. I have never been able to get a charge on the earbuds less than a month after I got them.

title: Great sound
text: So far so good. Sound quality is great and haven't had any problems.

title: Not worth it
text:
I believe this is the second or third time I bought these and it is good until one side stops working.
Same problem all the time and it seems to last just until it’s past the return date.

title: Awesome
text: Awesome just what I needed for long work days

title: Very pleased with Customer Service
text: We had an issue with connectivity but customer service went above and beyond to help us get the problem rectified. Highly recommend.

title: Easy setup, nice looking headphones.
text: Easy setup, nice looking headphones. Sound is much better then I was expecting for Bluetooth headphones. I really like the battery readout on the charging base and each individual ear piece in the base as well as it charging. Worth the price!

title: ear cushions/caps not included as promised
text: expected to have ear cushions/caps included as promised, but did not receive.

title: The Best Ear Bud
text: I like them so much I have two sets a black one and a blue one. Keep one in my car and one in my house, so if I come in with you please I need a charger I just stick it in one and I have in the house you will never go wrong with one of these.

title: Better than $100 earbuds.  Highly recommend.
text: Great earbuds at a great price. Sound is great and they fit perfectly.

title: Cool design and comfortable with great features.
text: I love these headphones. It's very comfortable, with great sound.

title: Excelente.
text: Muy buen sonido, fácil de usar, buena duración de batería.

title: Quirky at best, annoying at worst...
text:
The headphones fit nice in my ears and are comfy, but sometimes one of them doesn't want to charge, leaving you with only one headphone. 😐 Otherwise battery life is great. The Bluetooth connectivity is quirky at best, annoying at worst. Even when you disconnect them from Bluetooth, they want to keep connecting to your phone, which is annoying if you connect your phone to multiple Bluetooth devices (car, Bluetooth speaker, etc.). You have to "forget" them in the Bluetooth settings, but fortunately it's easy to reconnect. And they randomly turn on even when they are in the charging box, which is super annoying when I want to take a phone call. My phone automatically chooses to take the call from these headphones which are sitting in the case.

Overall, they work with some coaxing. Wouldn't really recommend them unless you are a tinkerer.

title: Awesome!
text: Finally cut the cord and I love these!

title: You will not regret buying it
text: Great in every respect. Worth the price I paid for it. I highly recommend it.

title: great workout companions
text: These are great for working out, and 90% of the time they stay in my ear, even while doing HIIT workouts. They sound great, have a great battery life, and actually look good if thats important to you. The only issues I have if that even after wiping them down and mounting they in the case they stay connected sometimes, and that the case does do wireless charging(they dont claim it does), very happy with them.

title: Comfort and great sound
text:
These are very comfortable you can wear for hours. The sound if great, you can wear them walking and they don't fall off.
The only complain I have is if you are using them for phone calls the mic isn't that great.
They will not be able to hear you.

title: These are Junk!
text: I wanted so badly for these to work.  When new, my iPhone picked them right up.  The next time my phone could not even find them.  I followed all the instructions to fix them and still could never get them to work.  I have had them for 5 months now and can't return them, unfortunately.  I keep trying to find them and pair them but I think it's hopeless after all this time.  My $10 Bluetooth headphones from Dollar General pair up and work just fine.

title: Hard to turn on and off .
text: Pretty.  Like the ear piece.  did not cancel static noise in baby monitor so not good at noise cancellation.

title: Great earbuds
text: Works great and fits great. Hard to find ones that will fit due to my small ears. Sound quality is awesome.

title: Long battery life/great sound
text: I love these earbuds! They fit snug in my ears but don’t cause pain. The sound quality is above average! Good value for the money!

title: Not bad for the buck!!!
text: Had them for 2months and so far so good

title: Great sound
text: This is the only earbud that stays in my ear. Don't have to worry about losing them.

title: Failed at ability to charge in 1 month
text:
These worked well - until the charger base failed to charge one earbud, now makes them a useless set.

Do not buy, do not recommend.

title: Great value
text: Great price & style for an active young man.

title: Excellent sound quality and easy to pair
text: Got a new phone and realized that there's no jack for earbuds. I am very happy with these wireless earbuds. The sound quality is excellent! I like the part that attaches to my ear. I was nervous that buds without this piece would fall out unexpectedly. The attachment is a nice soft flexible rubber. It's very comfortable on my ear. Pairing the devices was simple as I had to pair them to each other and then to the phone. I also love the fact that I can see what the battery life is on these. I love these!

title: Sound is good!
text: Sound is very good and they are comfortable to wear

title: Short lived
text: Had these only a year before they stopped working.  No longer charges.  Waste of money.

title: great but.
text: great sound quality , without the big price tag.

title: Upgrades
text: What I like to so far ia the quality of upgrade over my others  is the battery life, the sound quality and the feel of the headphones themselves. The beat part is battery power the charge box holds recharging my earbuds and showing the actual charge left but the main part I dislike is the automatic shutoff so I can really tell id my ear buds are really charged

title: Cheaply made...spend the extra money and get OEM products
text: Very cheaply made, you pay for what you get

title: These earbuds are excellent! High quality!
text: These ear buds are so worth the money. I couldn't be more pleased by the quality, sound and functionality of these earbuds. Easy 5 stars.

title: Nice Headphones, Poor Battery
text: These are nice headphones, but the battery does not hold the charge.  They had no power on arrival, which was a surprise, because most items have at least a little charge.  I charged them, and they worked well.  However, after about 45 minutes of use, the battery was spent.  I recharged them, and once again, the battery power started decreasing immediately.  Although I didn't use them, the battery decreased completely within a few hours.  Sadly, these will be returned.

title: Great buds.
text: I absolutely love these. I have a hard time keeping things in my ears but these fits so well and I almost don't even realize it's there. I'm giving them 5 stars because they work so well if the durability changes I will command and update.  They connect easily and paired easily. All around they are great

title: Lasted for a whole 5 months
text: Be aware that this product has a life expectancy of a round five months, if you read the reviews from other people you can see they’re having the similar issue. If longevity is important to you when you buy things I highly recommend to avoid this product.

title: Sounded Good - Missing Earbuds
text:
They sound good, fit comfortably but took one star off because I received 3 large earbuds and only 1 small one (which I needed because my ears are very small).
Take note of the volume control, which wasn't working well for me, are individually controlled. I'm not sure I like that feature but we'll see with the replacement buds and I'll update my review.

title: IMPRESSED!
text: I will probably return to make an edit however I have had these headphones for over a month now. They turn on by themselves, and when you turn them off it is quite easy. The sound is amazing, you don't need the volume all the way up. They also have a sturdy, trusted, case for them.

title: Doesn't give me confidence, wish I had returned
text:
Seems to do ok, people tell me that they can hear me fine. However, I don't have confidence when using them as people constantly seem to be talking over me and/or not acting like they've heard me. I wonder if there is a sound delay? I definitely default to using my wired headphones on calls where I know I'm going to talk a lot.

I do really like that I don't have to use both ear buds together but rather can use them independently and both still receive and send audio. I do wish they had a longer battery life, I think they typically only last a few hours on Zoom calls, but instead I just wear one bud and then swap to the other when it starts to get extra glitchy, indicating the battery is running low.

I read the mixed reviews but decided to go for them. I wish I had returned these while the return window was still open as I don't feel like I can depend on them for group or 1:1 conversations.

I'm using them connected to my Macbook pro. I have not tried con

title: Great quality
text: Great quality, great for in the gym.

title: Super recommended.
text:
Sound excellent. Very comfortable, the battery last a eternity, for me it’s perfect to go to the gym.
For this price it’s excellent product, 100% recommended

title: Keeps turning back on while in charging case
text:
These are very comfortable to wear, and I have no issues with the audio quality. They worked great for just over a month. Then I noticed they started turning on and connecting to my phone automatically while in the charging case. Opening the case and pressing down on the headsets would turn them back off and start charging again. Cleaning the contacts with alcohol, has seemed to fix the issue, at least for now.

The only other complaint I have with them is the volume adjustment doesn't always work. Sometimes the volume buttons work fine, but other times, most often when the screen is off, I cannot change the volume from either headset.

title: Good price
text: Works well but have not used them a lot yet. But sounds good

title: Truly great... For a while. Then charging issues.
text:
I absolutely love these earbuds! Honestly, they would be 5 stars without question if it weren't for the charging issues I'm having.
After six months of essentially daily use my earbuds will only charge in the charging case if I use a scrunchie to make sure they get a solid contact.
I have cleaned the contact points with rubbing alcohol as recommended which may have helped ever so slightly for a short time, but now I'm at a point where I am limited as to when I can use them. Traveling with them, the intended use I got them for, isn't doable anymore because I can't charge them when they're tossed in a bag.
I misplaced the small card that came in the box that had info about the "lifetime warranty" so I seem to have no way to contact the seller as far as I can tell right now about getting them replaced.
If I'm successful in getting a replacement I'll update my review, but will for sure monitor a new pair for similar problems.
Seller: please give actual contact info

title: Great Headphones
text: Works great so far. Wore them for about 5 hours and they were very comfortable. They were easy to pair and sound great.
